summary: The diff adds a /store route and Store page UI with a neon theme, a store catalog with correct XP prices, and introduces stunt-detection and XP coin type definitions plus an in-race XP HUD. However, the actual XP coin spawning/collection gameplay loop, backend XP/unlock methods, and the required generated image assets under frontend/public/assets/generated are not evidenced in the provided diff summary. The diff also appears to include unrelated Stripe/subscription/payment flow work not requested (and contrary to the non-goal about real-money payments).

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend support for XP currency and permanent unlocks per Internet Identity principal, with methods to fetch XP+owned items, purchase items (deduct XP), and credit XP earned.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo shows new store-related types, but the diff excerpt is truncated before any concrete public methods (get status / purchase / credit XP) or persistence logic can be verified from the provided evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add collectible XP coins to race gameplay (1/5 common; 10/20 hidden or stunt-gated). Collecting a coin should credit XP and prevent re-collection of the same coin instance.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff adds coin type definitions and an XP HUD, but does not show any race/track code changes that place/spawn coins, detect collection, remove/mark coins collected, or call the backend to credit XP.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions RaceGame/SinglePlayerRace/F1RaceTrack changes but no coin spawning/collection shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement an explicit amazing-stunt trigger with cooldown that enables at least one 10/20 XP coin to become obtainable during that race.
missing_requirements.reason: A stunt detection utility with airtime/height/speed and a 5s cooldown is added, but no evidence shows it being integrated into race logic to spawn/reveal higher-value (10/20) coins when a stunt triggers.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the required generated neon-light thumbnails and XP coin images under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them via /assets/generated/...
missing_requirements.reason: Store/coin code references the expected /assets/generated/*.png paths, but no new static image files under frontend/public/assets/generated are included in the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Stripe/subscription plan and payment success/failure flow integration (real-money payments related functionality).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists real-money payments as a non-goal, but the diff shows Stripe-related plan UI and payment routes, and backend imports for Stripe/outcalls.
